title: Korak 47

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: Trebalo bi da odštampate f'\nExpenses for {category}:' nakon dodeljivanja vrednosti category.
tests.testString: ({ test: () => assert(runPython(`_Node(_code).find_function("main").find_whiles()[0].find_bodies()[0].find_ifs()[0].find_bodies()[3].is_equivalent("category = input('Enter category to filter: ')\\nprint(f'\\\\nExpenses for {category}:')")`)) })

description: Nakon dobijanja kategorije, ispišite sledeći f-string f'\nExpenses for {category}:'.
